# arePlugInsEnabled

**Instance Property**

A Boolean that indicates whether or not the web view allows plug-ins.

## Declaration

```swift
var arePlugInsEnabled: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

Set to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the web view should allow plug-ins, otherwise [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].
title: arePlugInsEnabled
